title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with Mejiro
Ardan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh? Are those the "Cuties" I've heard about?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan points toward a claw machine filled
with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I knew that Chiyono O wanted one of these, and
after seeing how cute they are, I can't say I'm
surprised.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Actually, I'm starting to want one myself. If
I had a Cutie in my room, I could look upon it
whenever I wanted.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...If I may ask, how does one go about acquiring
one through this machine?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: You will, Trainer? Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I shall watch closely and learn from your example.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
